criteria_verification.evidence: Implemented build_publisher_and_emitter in src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_lifecycle.py. The factory constructs PipelinePublisher(client) and then PipelineLifecycleEmitter(publisher=publisher, config=...) and returns the tuple. Tests TestFactoryReturnsBoundPair::test_returns_publisher_and_emitter_types, ::test_publisher_is_bound_to_supplied_client (asserts publisher._nc is fake_client), and ::test_emitter_is_bound_to_returned_publisher (asserts emitter._publisher is publisher) verify the binding.
criteria_verification.notes: Implemented build_publisher_and_emitter in src/forge/cli/_serve_deps_lifecycle.py. The factory constructs PipelinePublisher(client) and then PipelineLifecycleEmitter(publisher=publisher, config=...) and returns the tuple. Tests TestFactoryReturnsBoundPair::test_returns_publisher_and_emitter_types, ::test_publisher_is_bound_to_supplied_client (asserts publisher._nc is fake_client), and ::test_emitter_is_bound_to_returned_publisher (asserts emitter._publisher is publisher) verify the binding.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: No second NATS connection is opened anywhere in this factory.
criteria_verification.evidence: The factory only calls PipelinePublisher(client) — it never imports nats nor calls nats.connect. Test TestFactoryDoesNotOpenSecondConnection::test_no_call_to_nats_connect patches sys.modules['nats'] with a sentinel whose connect is an AsyncMock that raises AssertionError on call, then asserts connect was never called. test_publisher_publish_uses_supplied_client confirms publish writes go through the supplied client, not a phantom second connection.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Publish failure on any `emit_*` does **not** raise to callers —
criteria_verification.evidence: The contract is satisfied by the existing PipelinePublisher._publish_envelope (logs at WARNING via logger.warning at line 193 of pipeline_publisher.py before raising PublishFailure) combined with PipelineLifecycleEmitter._safe_publish (catches PublishFailure and returns without re-raising at lines 748-757 of pipeline/__init__.py). The factory wires both objects together so this swallow-and-log path is the production code path. Existing test TestPublishFailureSwallowed::test_every_emit_method_swallows_publish_failure in tests/forge/test_pipeline_lifecycle.py verifies all eight emit_* methods do not raise on PublishFailure. Per the task brief: 'The PipelinePublisher class itself is not modified. Just construct it.' so no further code change is required for this AC.
